raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track ahead is a long westward straight with car near center; waypoint delta ~20° left indicates a moderate left correction needed to stay on the racing line.
knowledge: Track has a long westward straight around waypoints 70-80, heading ~160-180°
Car is consistently near center and well within safe margin throughout this section
Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections
Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections
Delta near +5-10° means gentle left correction — use steering_angle=+5
Delta near -5-10° means gentle right correction — use steering_angle=-5
Delta near +15-25° means moderate left correction — use steering_angle=+10
Car heading ~160° on westward straight, track continues west then curves south
Waypoints 70-76 are on the westward straight section near y=4.49-4.50
When delta drops below 5°, immediately switch to 0 steering to prevent oscillation
